{{Infobox character
| name = Emriss Silentborn
| aliases = Emriss
| species = Remnant
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[sacred arts]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, gentle leaves, [[Forged madra]], weave life aura}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Monarch Remnant, [[Monarch]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, Queen of the Everwood Continent, Monarch of Titan's Grove}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Underlord]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, Forest Monarch}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Herald]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Everwood continent]], Titan's Grove}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Emriss Silentborn Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Emriss Silentborn, also known as the Forest Monarch or [[Remnant]] [[Monarch]], is a powerful figure and [[the Queen]] of the [[Everwood]] Continent. Originally a men’hla tree, she attained sentience through extraordinary circumstances and ascended to become a [[Monarch]]. In her human form, she appears as a dark-haired woman with bark-like skin and hair composed of braided blue-green vines, often carrying a staff topped with a [[diamond]] flower. She is associated with the Life and Oracle [[Icons]]. As a [[Monarch]], Emriss is known for her public presence and her efforts to spread peace, education, and language across the globe. She created the [[Dreamway]], an expansive interconnected [[library]] of [[dream tablets]] designed to inspire artists and preserve knowledge. While she often projects a soothing, motherly, and reassuring presence, she is also a strategic leader capable of viewing multiple possible futures. She has a long-standing and complex history with the [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Silent King]], having previously fought to keep him at bay. Emriss is a significant figure in the management of post-war resources, repurposing items from the [[Dread War]] to motivate and equip the next generation of fighters.}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is the [[Monarch]] [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is [[the Queen]] of the [[Everwood]] Continent and [[Monarch]] of [[Titan]]'s Grove.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is the most public of the [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Emriss Silentborn]] was once a men’hla tree before her ascension.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a person people fight for in the [[Everwood continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Born as a tree, Emriss Silentborn attained sentience through the men'hla tree and eventually took the form of a young woman upon advancing to [[Underlord]]. As a [[Monarch]] dedicated to spreading peace, education, and the gift of language, Emriss appeared as a giant tree with bark-like skin and luminous blue-green vine hair while wielding a [[diamond]]-flower staff. This [[Monarch]] was eventually assassinated by three rival [[Monarchs]] who joined forces. Emriss also served as the source of a sword codex, which was provided to [[Yerin]] as a prize.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Emriss Silentborn]] appears as a giant tree with dark skin like bark and hair made of luminous blue-green vines.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Emriss Silentborn]] uses a [[diamond]]-flower staff that exudes blue-and-pink light.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Emriss disappeared in a rustle of spectral leaves.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Emriss is a [[Monarch]] who spreads peace and education.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Emriss Silentborn]] was born a tree.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Emriss attained sentience through the men'hla tree.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Upon advancing to [[Underlord]], Emriss took the form of a young woman.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Emriss was assassinated by three rival [[Monarchs]] who joined forces.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Emriss spreads the gift of language.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Emriss Silentborn]] sent a prize to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is the source of the sword codex.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Emriss gave [[Yerin]] a sword codex.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Emriss is a figure associated with the [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Emriss Silentborn is a massive blue-green tree whose canopy reaches toward the sky. This entity possesses leaves that are set with functioning eyes, and its [[madra]] was once part of an organic [[script-circle]]. Emriss maintains a history with the [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Silent King]], who seeks revenge against them.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is someone the [[Silent King]] wants revenge against.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emriss Silentborn]]'s [[madra]] was part of an organic [[script-circle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a blue-green tree big enough to brush the sky.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emriss Silentborn]]'s leaves are set with functioning eyes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emriss Silentborn]] has a history with the [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|As the oldest [[Monarch]], Emriss Silentborn rules the [[Everwood continent]] and is widely recognized for her selfless contributions to global order. When the sky turned black, she spoke to her citizens, warning them to deny any strangers attempting to enter their minds through dreams. Through her immense power and preparations, she prevented the continent from bowing to the [[Silent King]] and successfully sealed him away. During a battle against the [[Dreadgod]], she manifested as a dark-haired woman with a staff to protect [[Lindon]] while he weakened the beast. This transforming tree-woman, who possesses a gentle but mocking voice, can observe entire battlefields and multiple possible futures simultaneously. To facilitate her teaching, she created the [[Dreamway]], which allows her to slip into dreams and send messages at a great personal expense.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">20</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a [[Monarch]] who rules the [[Everwood continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a [[Monarch]] who spoke to citizens after the sky turned black.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] warned citizens to deny strangers who try to enter their minds in dreams.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] intends to take [[Kerani]] to [[Emriss Silentborn]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Emriss knows everything about the [[Chief Guardians]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] called for help.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]]'s power and preparations prevented the [[Everwood continent]] from bowing to the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] has sealed the [[Silent King]] off.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a woman with a gentle but mocking voice.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] watched the entire battlefield at once, including multiple possible futures.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dreadgod]] wanted to kill Emriss.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] whispered into the [[Dreadgod]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] intended to keep others off [[Lindon]] while he weakened the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is the oldest [[Monarch]] and protected [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] took human form as a dark-haired woman carrying a staff.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Emriss tapped her staff, which had a blue-green flashing [[diamond]] at its top.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a transforming tree-woman.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a [[Monarch]] who is known for giving selflessly to global order.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emriss Silentborn]] made the [[Dreamway]] so she could slip into people's dreams to teach them.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Emriss sends messages through the [[Dreamway]] at great expense.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Herald]] and [[Monarch]] with bark-like skin, Emriss Silentborn possesses a leaf ripe with healing authority and can sustain herself for years without sustenance. After spending centuries [[binding]] the [[Silent King]], she was captured by [[Northstrider]] and [[Reigan Shen]] and held within a scripted bubble of glass inside a dark ocean. While imprisoned, she discussed the intelligence of [[Dreadgods]] and viewed the current era as the best opportunity to end them, a goal driven by her fear of losing her population. Appearing on a half-ruined hillside, she used [[Forged madra]] and techniques like gentle leaves to join the fight, even attempting to trap Reigan. Ultimately, she used her [[diamond]]-headed staff to lead the group through a gateway and left behind plans for [[Lindon]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">34</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]]'s leaf is ripe with healing authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a [[Monarch]] who can cooperate with others and restore spirits.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss is mentioned by the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss taught [[Lindon]] how the [[Void Icon]] clouds his future.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a character who decimated the [[Silent Servants]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss is one of the five targets to take out before another [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss can sustain herself for years without food or water.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss spent centuries [[binding]] the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss's greatest fear is losing her population to the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss required an escort.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss is in a prison.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] has a prison.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] was held in a scripted bubble of glass within a dark ocean.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]]'s skin has the consistency of bark in her current form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] was captured by [[Northstrider]] and [[Reigan Shen]] together.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] possesses a [[diamond]]-headed staff.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss is a peer to others who discuss the intelligence of [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss possesses a staff.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss believes the current situation is the best chance to be rid of the [[Dreadgods]] since the last [[Dread War]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss has a connection to the [[Oracle Icon]] and the [[Life Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss can see [[Yerin]]'s thoughts hanging around her head like a shifting cloud.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] advises [[Ziel]] to expect a fight during his advancement.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is a person [[Sha Miara]] believes can be reasoned with.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] has been lying to [[Sha Miara]]'s family for generations.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss uses [[Forged madra]] to weave [[life]] [[aura]] and accelerate healing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] appears on a half-ruined hillside.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss attempted to trap Reigan.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss used techniques like gentle leaves to join the fight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss placed a hand on [[Yerin]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss led the group through the gateway using a [[diamond]]-headed staff.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss has leaves in her hair.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss has bark-like patterns on her skin.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]] left plans for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Emriss Silentborn serves as the Forest Monarch, a ruler characterized by dark skin marked with patterns similar to tree bark and striking purple and green eyes. This monarch utilizes a staff crafted from living wood that features a softly glowing crystal at its peak. Beyond leadership, Emriss possesses the specific power to cleanse injuries. Additionally, they have worked to pool together various supplies that were left behind following the conclusion of the [[Dread War]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Emriss Silentborn]] is the Forest Monarch.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Emriss is a [[Monarch]] who pooled supplies left behind after the [[Dread War]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Emriss Silentborn]] has the power to cleanse injuries.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Emriss has dark skin with patterns resembling tree bark.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Emriss has purple and green eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Emriss uses a staff of living wood topped with a softly glowing crystal.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Emriss could have—” The Sword Sage visibly realized he’d been about to compare Lindon to a Monarch and forced a cough.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“We were decimated by Emriss Silentborn, and you did nothing!<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“It was him and Reigan Shen together,” Emriss said sadly.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss Silentborn’s voice blew over to them like leaves on a gentle wind. “You should expect a fight.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“We can reason with Emriss! She’ll listen!”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
